children.heading: Appropriate congressional committees
children.label: 1 Appropriate congressional committees
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this chapter, the term “appropriate congressional committees” means the Committees on Appropriations and Foreign Relations of the Senate and the Committees on Appropriations and Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Counterinsurgency
children.label: 2 Counterinsurgency
children.text: The term “counterinsurgency” means efforts to defeat organized movements that seek to overthrow the duly constituted Governments of Pakistan and Afghanistan through violent means.

children.heading: Counterterrorism
children.label: 3 Counterterrorism
children.text: The term “counterterrorism” means efforts to combat al Qaeda and other foreign terrorist organizations that are designated by the Secretary of State in accordance with , or other individuals and entities engaged in terrorist activity or support for such activity.section 1189 of title 8

children.heading: FATA
children.label: 4 FATA
children.text: The term “FATA” means the Federally Administered Tribal Areas of Pakistan.

children.heading: Frontier Crimes Regulation
children.label: 5 Frontier Crimes Regulation
children.text: The term “Frontier Crimes Regulation” means the Frontier Crimes Regulation, codified under British law in 1901, and applicable to the FATA.

children.heading: Impact evaluation research
children.label: 6 Impact evaluation research
children.text: The term “impact evaluation research” means the application of research methods and statistical analysis to measure the extent to which change in a population-based outcome can be attributed to program intervention instead of other environmental factors.

children.heading: Major defense equipment
children.label: 7 Major defense equipment
children.text: The term “major defense equipment” has the meaning given the term in .section 2794(6) of this title

children.heading: NWFP
children.label: 8 NWFP
children.text: The term “NWFP” means the North West Frontier Province of Pakistan, which has Peshawar as its provincial capital.

children.heading: Operations research
children.label: 9 Operations research
children.text: The term “operations research” means the application of social science research methods, statistical analysis, and other appropriate scientific methods to judge, compare, and improve policies and program outcomes, from the earliest stages of defining and designing programs through their development and implementation, with the objective of the rapid dissemination of conclusions and concrete impact on programming.

children.heading: Security forces of Pakistan
children.label: 10 Security forces of Pakistan
children.text: The term “security forces of Pakistan” means the military and intelligence services of the Government of Pakistan, including the Armed Forces, Inter-Services Intelligence Directorate, Intelligence Bureau, police forces, levies, Frontier Corps, and Frontier Constabulary.
